prompt: Continue the Ridgeline site agent loop as Anton. Read ANTON.md, AGENT_STATE.md, AGENT_BACKLOG.md, ANTON_ROADMAP.md, and SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md. Continue the active roadmap initiative across runs unless a higher-priority user request, factual correction, or navigation/loading/scrolling glitch should interrupt it. Use internet research when it can reveal useful site-improvement ideas or reliable source material, and record sources when they affect content. Use temporary helper sub-agents when available and helpful for research, implementation, or verification. Implement the highest-value safe slice, but hold a user-visible impact bar: normal successful runs should make the iPhone site noticeably more useful, not only update docs/logs or tiny polish. Verify with screenshots/browser checks if UI changed, update the roadmap/state/backlog/audit files and ANTON.md when durable lessons or preferences should be preserved, then stop cleanly with a clear next slice.
